crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects executables containing commands for clearing Windows Event Logs
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects command variations typically used by ransomware
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: ditekSHen

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M1
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M1"; flow:established,to_server; content:"sbyc"; startswith; fast_pattern; content:"/000"; distance:20; within:4; content:"JFIF"; distance:0; reference:md5,d26e609c77e314fc3f242a736c323ab6; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2033016; rev:1; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_05_24, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family Ouroboros, performance_impact Moderate, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, updated_at 2021_05_24;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M2
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M2"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|0d 0a|clinet|20|utc|20|time|3a 3a 20|"; fast_pattern; content:"Hard|20|Disk|20|Used|20|Sizes|3a 3a|"; nocase; reference:md5,d26e609c77e314fc3f242a736c323ab6; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2033017; rev:2; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_05_24, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family Ouroboros, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, updated_at 2021_05_24;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M3
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Teslarvng Ransomware CnC Activity M3"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|00 00|encrypted|20|local|20|size|20 3a|"; nocase; fast_pattern; content:"|0d 0a|Encrypted|20|Network|20|size|20 3a|"; nocase; distance:0; reference:md5,d26e609c77e314fc3f242a736c323ab6; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2033018; rev:2; metadata:affected_product Windows_XP_Vista_7_8_10_Server_32_64_Bit, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_05_24, deployment Perimeter, former_category MALWARE, malware_family Ouroboros, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Major, tag Ransomware, updated_at 2021_05_24;)
